supersession.reason: Cargo cancels unscheduled targets after denied-warning failures unless --keep-going is used, so the v1 fingerprint subset and its 190/373 anchor are scheduling-sensitive and cannot be a reproducible comparator.
preserved_dispositions: The original non-keep-going command remains truthful BASELINE_RED evidence only.
The verification-only boundary, no-ADR determination, absolute-green non-clippy gates, and implementation scope remain unchanged.
This record remains immutable history and is not silently rewritten as the v2 anchor.

trigger.new_fact: The original command fails on the clean pinned base before any R-051 change, so an absolute-green interpretation is impossible and would force either a false claim or unauthorized unrelated cleanup.
trigger.affected_step_stopped: R-051 may continue in-scope implementation and absolute-green non-clippy verification, but may not reach DEV_VERIFIED, Fable task review, Opus review, or PM acceptance until this accepted differential gate and its final-head evidence are bound.

fingerprint_contract.input: Cargo JSON lines whose reason is compiler-message and whose diagnostic code is non-null.
fingerprint_contract.normalization: Sort tuples lexicographically by code, file, and message; group exact tuples; record exact multiplicity. Source line/column, rendered ANSI text, target order, and summary diagnostics without a code are excluded.
fingerprint_contract.canonical_encoding: Pretty JSON array emitted by jq with keys code, file, message, multiplicity in that order and one trailing newline.
pass_rule: The final run uses the identical argv, toolchain transcript, Cargo.lock, and allowlisted-environment digests.
The final non-owned-path fingerprint multiset is exactly equal to the baseline non-owned-path multiset.
For every owned-path fingerprint, final multiplicity is less than or equal to baseline multiplicity.
No final fingerprint absent from the baseline is allowed in any partition.
The R-051 diff adds no allow, expect, cap-lints, lint-level, or lint-configuration escape.
Both expected exit codes remain 101 because unrelated baseline diagnostics remain; neither exit is called PASS by itself.

forbidden_dispositions: Do not edit unrelated baseline paths.
Do not add blanket or local lint allowances to manufacture a green result.
Do not drop clippy observation or reduce R-051 behavior to avoid diagnostics.
Do not claim the repository-wide clippy invocation passes.
Do not include unredacted environment values or personal configuration in evidence.

boundary_disposition.adr_rationale: This is a verification-truth correction for a pre-existing repository condition. Authority, dependencies, writes, serialized contracts, runtime behavior, and product scope are unchanged.

mandatory_precision_applied: non-owned exact equality and owned subset rules
identical toolchain, argv, environment, and lock identities

fresh_review_requirement.implementation_review_cycle: fresh independent Opus session after final R-051 DEV_VERIFIED head
fresh_review_requirement.required_reproduction: Run both exact locked structured commands, regenerate canonical fingerprints, verify the delta rules and all absolute-green gates, and report clean pre/post state with repository_authorship=false.

pm_decision.basis: The base failure is independently reproducible, the differential retains regression power without widening task scope, standing Fable passed the precision contract, no ADR trigger changes, and task-level fresh Opus plus PM acceptance remain mandatory.

next_action: Bind this accepted mutation to the R-051 owner, capture the final-head fingerprint artifact and delta, then run standing Fable task review, fresh Opus review, and the main-PM acceptance audit.
